text: Being here, I am struck by a sense of curiosity and wonder. The glass wall and the clean, modern design invite contemplation, while the "R+D" sign and the philosophical text on the screen further awaken my intellectual appetite. I feel as though I am in a place where thought and innovation are celebrated—a sanctuary for inquiry. There is both a sense of isolation and connection, as if I stand on the threshold between private rumination and collaborative discovery. It is an invigorating, slightly surreal feeling—being at the heart of a space dedicated to questioning and imagining the future.
